summary: Alley Boss engages in a high-stakes battle against Mano and his guild, who utilize a powerful but temporary stacking buff skill. Despite Mano's overwhelming temporary stat increase, Alley Boss uses the situation to his advantage, intentionally drawing out the fight to reach a specific experience threshold. Ultimately, Alley Boss survives the onslaught, levels up mid-combat, and turns the tide of the battle against his opponents.
key_moments: Mano and the Fortress Knights activate their stacking buff skills, increasing their stats by 430%.
Alley Boss survives Mano's overwhelming attack, revealing that he was waiting to reach 9999% EXP.
Alley Boss levels up mid-fight, fully restoring his stamina and mana to counterattack the guild members.
